instructions: On the Google Business Profile (or public Google Maps listing), use 'Ask a question' to post each question from the owner/another account, then answer it from the business account. This seeds the Q&A section and improves local rankings.

qa.question: Do you clean medical offices?
qa.answer: Yes. TPS Pro provides commercial cleaning and janitorial service for medical and healthcare facilities throughout Albany and the Capital Region — including private practices, dental and urgent care offices, labs, and clinics. We follow proper disinfection protocols for high-touch surfaces, exam rooms, and restrooms, use EPA-approved products, and schedule after hours so we never disrupt patient flow. Fully insured and bonded. Call (518) 948-7156 for a free walkthrough and quote.

qa.question: Do you offer contracts for property managers?
qa.answer: Absolutely — property managers are who we're built for. TPS Pro offers ongoing janitorial and maintenance contracts (daily, weekly, or monthly) plus high-volume make-ready and turnover cleaning across multiple units and buildings. You get consistent crews, flexible scheduling around your tenants, volume pricing, and one point of contact for your whole portfolio in Albany, Troy, Schenectady, and the greater Capital Region. Call (518) 948-7156 to set up a free walkthrough.

qa.question: Are you available for same-day cleaning?
qa.answer: Often, yes. For urgent needs — a last-minute showing, a post-construction punch-out, or an unexpected turnover — TPS Pro can frequently mobilize same-day or next-day across the Albany Capital Region, depending on crew availability. The sooner you call, the better we can fit you in. Reach us at (518) 948-7156 and we'll tell you exactly what we can do today.
